games.title: Subway Surfers
games.description: Dash and dodge trains in the world-famous endless runner. Collect coins, unlock hoverboards, and outrun the inspector!

games.title: 8-Ball Billiards
games.description: Championship class 8-Ball Pool. Play against an intelligent computer AI or local two-player mode with realistic physics.

games.title: Geometry Dash
games.description: Jump, fly, and flip your way through dangerous passages and spiky obstacles in this rhythm-based action platformer.

games.title: Eaglercraft
games.description: Minecraft 1.8.8 web client. Explore endless worlds, build magnificent structures, and survive against nocturnal monsters.

games.title: GTA Vice City
games.description: Step into the neon-lit 1980s streets of Vice City in this WebAssembly reverse-engineered open-world classic.

games.title: Drift Hunters
games.description: Superb 3D car drifting simulator. Tune your engine, choose from 25+ drift cars, and burn rubber across multiple racing tracks.

games.title: YouTube
games.description: Watch videos, stream live channels, subscribe to creators, and discover the world's video library in a secure environment.

games.title: Instagram
games.description: Browse stories, reels, photos, and connect with your friends on the world's most popular visual social network.

games.title: HDSFD Dashboard
games.description: Personal productivity engine. Manage your Pomodoro timer, tasks, schedule, and notes in a sleek distraction-free setup.
